channel.name: FhirBundlleReplay
channel.description: Version: 0.1.5 Updated toJsonb() to handle java.lang.String values and added validation to datalake api url.

list.string: Content-Type, Authorization, X-TechBD-Base-FHIR-URL, X-TechBD-Tenant-ID, User-Agent, X-TechBD-REMOTE-IP, X-TechBD-Override-Request-URI, X-Correlation-ID, accept, X-TechBD-DataLake-API-URL, X-TechBD-HealthCheck, X-TechBD-Validation-Severity-Level, X-SHIN-NY-IG-Version

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: lookup_manager
Validate Http request and collect headers

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Http url and method validation

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: destination_datalake

codeTemplateLibrary.name: checkContactTypes
codeTemplateLibrary.description:
This library was added upon migration to version 3.3.0. It includes all pre-existing code templates, and is set to be included on all pre-existing and new channels.
You should create your own new libraries and assign code templates to them as you see fit. You should also link libraries to specific channels, so that you're not necessarily including all code templates on all channels all the time.
